english: to treat / to handle / to deal with
notes: Can mean to treat a person (medically or in terms of behavior), or to deal with a topic.

sentences.german: Der Arzt behandelt den Patienten mit neuen Medikamenten.
sentences.english: The doctor is treating the patient with new medication.

sentences.german: Die Lehrerin hat das Thema ausführlich behandelt.
sentences.english: The teacher dealt with the topic in detail.

sentences.german: Er behandelt seine Mitarbeiter immer wie Erwachsene.
sentences.english: He always treats his employees like adults.
